message:
Running command: # The python process opened a pipe to stdin (fd 3). It's waiting for subprocess completion.
# Let me check if iverilog is running as a child
pstree -p $(ps aux | grep nc_verify | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1) 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
ps aux | grep -E "iverilog|vvp" | grep -v grep
